scope_summary: Second fresh post-fix verifier for the backend/API-only diagnostic draft/submission foundation for Q0, SA1-SA3 and Q1-Q3 under employee profile-session bearer auth. Verified the prior submit-response gap is fixed by a handoff-only DiagnosticSubmitResponse. Full MVP-07.01, MVP-07.04, MVP-07, the MVP stage and human gates remain open.

commands.cmd: jq diagnostic OpenAPI submit-response surface check
rg prohibited final-scoring/sensitive response fields in diagnostic production/OpenAPI/generated files

findings.title: Prior submit-response proof gap is fixed.
evidence: apps/api/src/main/java/com/finrhythm/api/diagnostic/web/DiagnosticSubmitResponse.java defines only state, routePreview, recommendedFirstLessonId, createdAt, updatedAt and submittedAt.

apps/api/src/main/java/com/finrhythm/api/diagnostic/web/DiagnosticAttemptController.java maps POST /api/v1/diagnostics/me/submit through toSubmitResponse instead of the full DiagnosticAttemptResponse.

apps/api/src/test/java/com/finrhythm/api/diagnostic/DiagnosticAttemptControllerIT.java asserts submit and repeated submit do not expose attemptId, employeeRegistrationId, tenantId, pilotLaunchId, accessPoolId, allowedAnswerIds, q0, selfAssessment or routingAnswers.

.agent/stages/mvp/raw/verifier-MVP-07-diagnostic-draft-api-001-20260513-postfix-fresh/openapi-diagnostic-surface.txt shows submit 200 references DiagnosticSubmitResponse and no forbidden submit fields are present.

findings.title: Backend/API acceptance is covered by independent execution.
evidence: Focused DiagnosticAttemptControllerIT passed with Java 21, Testcontainers PostgreSQL and Flyway v011 applied.
apps/api ./mvnw -q verify passed with Java 21.

The integration test covers profile-session bearer auth failures, same-registration resume through a new token, cross-registration isolation, separated Q0/SA/routing persistence, post-submit immutability, invalid ID/sensitive-field rejection and handoff-only submit.

findings.title: OpenAPI snapshot and generated client are synchronized.
evidence: pnpm --filter @finrhythm/api-client check:generated passed.
pnpm --filter @finrhythm/api-client check:openapi-drift passed.
pnpm --filter @finrhythm/api-client typecheck passed.

packages/api-client/openapi/finrhythm-api.openapi.json maps submit 200 to DiagnosticSubmitResponse; packages/api-client/src/generated/contracts.ts exposes submitDiagnosticMeDraft as Promise<DiagnosticSubmitResponse>.

findings.title: Docs sync and product-doc no-op are consistent.
evidence: docs/architecture/access-and-subscriptions.md documents the profile-session diagnostic draft boundary and includes Mermaid flow/state diagrams.
docs/architecture/access-and-subscriptions.md states submit may expose only routePreview=true, recommendedFirstLessonId=N1, state and timestamps.
product-docs-diff raw output is empty, matching the contract expectation that product docs remain unchanged for this backend/API-only slice.

findings.title: No browser evidence is required for this scoped slice.
evidence: .agent/stages/mvp/sprint_contract.md marks UI integration and browser screenshots out of scope.
No apps/web or apps/admin integration was required by this backend/API-only verification.

findings.title: Full MVP-07 and human gates remain open.
evidence: .agent/stages/mvp/backlog.md keeps MVP-07.01, MVP-07.04 and MVP-07 open.
.agent/stages/mvp/status.json keeps mvp_07_complete=false and human_gates_open=true.
.agent/stages/mvp/feature_list.json keeps active diagnostic-draft-api entries passes=false before parent status sync.
.agent/stages/mvp/publish_manifest.json has publish_after_pass=false.

human_gates_open: Final financial correctness of diagnostic questions and explanations
Legal/privacy boundaries and real employee/customer data processing approval
Admin/support production access policy for sensitive diagnostic data
Design/accessibility QA on real mobile screens for later UI integration
notes: Verifier wrote only the requested current post-fix verdict/problems artifacts plus raw verifier outputs under the allowed raw directory.
No production code, tests, generated client files, canonical docs, sprint contract, evidence aliases, status, backlog, progress, feature_list or publish_manifest were edited by this verifier.
This PASS is scoped to MVP-07-diagnostic-draft-api-001 only and does not mark full MVP-07.01, MVP-07.04, MVP-07, the MVP stage or any human gate complete.
The first fresh verifier FAIL remains preserved separately at the prefix-fail verdict/problems refs.
